calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul DeAngelis, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Pacific Union Real Estate Group, Ltd., a California Corporation.
Vern Hanson, plaintiff's Director of Risk Management, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Richard Gold, an individual.
Amended default was entered on October 6, 2008.
Does defendants were dismissed today, October 30, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Pacific Union Real Estate Gourp, Ltd., a California Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Richard Gold, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $70,536.49.
Prejudgment Interest - $18,144.45.
Attorney's Fees - $9,329.00.
Costs - $2,436.55, for a total judgment in the amount of $100,446.49.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
